history.speaker: cashier
history.text: Hello! Welcome to McDonald's drive-through. How can I help you today?

history.speaker: client
history.text: Hi there! I'm here for a hearty meal today. I can't have dairy because I'm lactose intolerant - do you have any recommendations?

history.speaker: cashier
history.text: I have Chicken McNuggets available as a hearty meal that doesn't contain dairy. Would you like to order that?

history.speaker: client
history.text: Yes, I'll take the Chicken McNuggets. Do you have any dairy-free sides or drinks to pair with that?

history.speaker: cashier
history.text: Great! I'll take your Chicken McNuggets. I don't have any dairy-free sides or drinks listed in the current menu options. Would you like to order just that, or would you prefer to check other categories?

history.speaker: client
history.text: Just the Chicken McNuggets, thank you! I'll be waiting for my order.

history.speaker: cashier
history.text: Your order is confirmed: 1 Chicken McNuggets®. Thank you for your patience! Have a great day.

history.speaker: client
history.text: Thank you! I'll be right over.

query_texts: popular menu items burger chicken fries

documents: Our World Famous Fries®. The crisp, craveable, fan favourite: our World Famous Fries®. These epic fries are crispy and golden on the outside and fluffy on the inside.. Potato and salt. The legend among legends.
